steps.title: Extract the slope from the parallel line
steps.content: Parallel lines have identical slopes. The given line $y = 7x + 4$ has slope $m = 7$, so our line must also have slope 7.

steps.title: Find the y-intercept using the given point
steps.content: Our line has the form $y = 7x + b$. Since it passes through $(0, 5)$, substitute into this equation: $$5 = 7(0) + b$$ $$b = 5$$ The equation is $y = 7x + 5$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
